reason: This passage (Genesis 24) narrates Abraham's servant finding a wife for Isaac among Abraham's kinfolk in Mesopotamia. The text contains no reference to any upcoming destruction, disaster, or calamity. The only references to Yahweh concern His blessing of Abraham and His guidance of the servant in fulfilling his mission. The entire narrative focuses on the positive outcome of the bride-seeking journey, culminating in Isaac's marriage to Rebekah.
